parsed.production_notes: The video is a 2D animated screencast of a mobile application. It uses vector graphics and standard motion design techniques, with no signs of AI generation.

characters.appearance: A stylized, cartoonish green owl with large eyes, a yellow beak, and a simple rounded body.
characters.demeanor: Expressive, ranging from encouraging to angry.

characters.appearance: A stylized 2D cartoon teenage girl with a pale complexion, short purple hair covering one eye, and a slender build.
A stylized 2D cartoon man with a broad build, light complexion, and short blonde hair.
characters.wardrobe: A red tracksuit with a white zipper and a pink shirt underneath.

panels.panel_visual_description: A stylized green owl face is centered at the top of a plain white background. A cartoonish brown hand with a pointing index finger moves across the screen and taps.

scenes.visual_description: A mobile app interface showing a language selection menu. The Duolingo owl is at the top. A cursor shaped like a hand clicks on 'Intermediate English', followed by a coin animation and a green checkmark.
scenes.on_screen_text:
What would you like to learn?
Intermediate English
Spanish
French
German
Italian
CONTINUE

panels.panel_visual_description: A small green owl character stands on a green circular base, looking angry with furrowed brows. A cartoonish brown hand with a pointing index finger moves across the screen and taps.

scenes.visual_description: An app exercise titled 'Complete the sentence'. The user selects 'woken up' instead of 'wake up'. The owl mascot looks angry. An incorrect feedback banner appears at the bottom in red.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Complete the sentence
I've three times already, but I don't need to until eight!
wake up
woken up
CONTINUE
CHECK
Incorrect
Correct Answer:
wake up, woken up
GOT IT
Keep trying!

panels.panel_visual_description: A stylized 2D cartoon girl with purple hair and a purple top stands on the left side of a plain white background. A cartoonish brown hand with a pointing index finger moves across the screen and taps.

scenes.visual_description: An app exercise titled 'Speak this sentence'. Character B is shown next to a speech bubble. The user taps a microphone button, an audio waveform appears, and then a green 'Nicely done!' banner appears at the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: I didn't expect you to help me so much!
scenes.on_screen_text:
Speak this sentence
I didn't expect you to help me so much!
TAP TO SPEAK
CONTINUE
Nicely done!

panels.panel_visual_description: A stylized 2D cartoon man in a red tracksuit stands on the left side of a plain white background. A cartoonish brown hand with a pointing index finger moves across the screen and taps.

scenes.visual_description: An app exercise titled 'Type the missing word'. Character C is shown next to a speech bubble. The user types 'set' instead of 'setting' using an on-screen keyboard. A red 'Incorrect' banner appears at the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character C says: Tomorrow's Sunday, so why are you setting the alarm?
scenes.on_screen_text:
Type the missing word
Tomorrow's Sunday, so why are you the alarm?
set
CHECK
Incorrect
Correct Answer:
Tomorrow's Sunday, so why are you setting the alarm?
GOT IT

panels.panel_visual_description: A green owl character sits on a stack of three colorful books (red, yellow, white) and reads a blue book. The background is plain white.

scenes.visual_description: An end card showing the Duolingo owl reading a book. Text appears above it, followed by the Duolingo logo and app store download buttons.
